holdings.infoBox: THRO is an equity ETF with a total of 244 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 8.03%, NVIDIA at 7.57%, Microsoft at 5.30%, Amazon.com at 4.98%, and Alphabet at 4.50%.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Thematic Rotation Active ETF (THRO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund of US stocks selected to provide exposure to multiple themes, including emerging and structural trends. THRO was launched on Dec 14, 2021 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: ETF Edge: Midyear outlooks, active ETFs and Q3 themes
data.text: Jay Jacobs, BlackRock U.S. Head of Equity ETFs, and Roger Hallam, Vanguard global head of rates, share their outlooks for the rest of year, key trends to watch in the ETF space and the strategy behind...
